siteDescription: Discover delicious recipes from around the world. From quick meals to gourmet dishes, find the perfect recipe for any occasion.

sections.title: Welcome to Recipia: Your Recipe Paradise
sections.description: Explore our collection of carefully curated recipes from passionate home cooks and professional chefs. From quick weekday dinners to special occasion feasts - find the perfect dish for every moment.

sections.headline: Discover the Joy of Cooking
sections.description: Browse our collection of tested and loved recipes. Step-by-step instructions, cooking tips, and beautiful food photography.

sections.title: Browse by Category
sections.description: Find the perfect recipe for any meal or occasion

categories.name: Quick & Easy
categories.description: Delicious meals ready in 30 minutes or less

sections.title: Popular Recipes
sections.description: Our community's most loved dishes this week

testimonials.author: Sarah M.
testimonials.content: The detailed instructions and tips made it so easy to recreate these delicious recipes. My family loves everything I've made!

testimonials.author: Michael P.
testimonials.content: Such a great collection of recipes! I especially love the quick meal section for busy weeknights.

testimonials.author: Lisa K.
testimonials.content: As a beginner in the kitchen, these recipes are perfect. Clear instructions and always delicious results!

sections.title: Cooking Questions
sections.description: Common questions about our recipes and cooking techniques

faqs.question: How are the recipes tested?
faqs.answer: Each recipe is thoroughly tested in our kitchen and by our community of home cooks to ensure consistent, delicious results.

faqs.question: Can I adjust the serving sizes?
faqs.answer: Yes! Most recipes include a serving size calculator that automatically adjusts ingredient quantities.

faqs.question: Are nutritional facts available?
faqs.answer: We provide detailed nutritional information for each recipe, including calories, macronutrients, and dietary considerations.

faqs.question: Can I share my own recipes?
faqs.answer: Absolutely! Our community loves trying new recipes. Use the 'Share Your Recipe' button to submit your favorite dishes.

sections.title: Cooking Tips & Stories
sections.description: Latest recipes, cooking techniques, and food stories from our community

sections.title: Join Our Kitchen Community
sections.description: Get weekly recipe inspiration, cooking tips, and seasonal favorites delivered to your inbox
